Brand Identity Logos Color Palette Typography UI Components Landing Mockup
PostPilot Design System v1.0

One raw idea,
a week's worth of content.

This document serves as the single source of truth for the PostPilot brand identity, design variables, assets, and component standards. Built to empower developers and content strategists to create cohesive, premium experiences.

Explore Assets Preview Landing Page

Brand Vision & Strategy

PostPilot bridges the gap between chaotic content creation and streamlined, consistent automated brand storytelling.

1. Core Value Proposition

Transforms one raw text thought into platform-optimized, high-converting social media posts (caption, hashtags, and customized graphics) for Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X in seconds.

2. Target Audience

Solo creators, consultant/coaches (1-5 person squads) wanting to maintain consistent, high-value social presences, plus local boutiques/service businesses looking to scale.

3. Star Business KPIs

Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR), Active Subscriber Ratio (at least 1 post scheduled in the last 14 days), Net Churn Rate < 5%, and average posts generated per user.

Brand Logo Directory

Downloadable vector formats optimized for light themes, dark themes, and icon-only layouts.

Logo Icon Only

Minimalist vector icon. Best for mobile app home screens, browser tab favicons, and avatar profiles.

Download SVG

Primary Logo (Light Theme)

The default primary brand mark. To be rendered on clear white or ice light backgrounds.

Download SVG

Inverted Logo (Dark Theme)

Luminous text and high-contrast gradients designed explicitly for dark backgrounds and dashboard headers.

Download SVG

Official Color Palette

Carefully structured colors matching the Tailwind system and the PostPilot CSS design tokens.

Primary & Accent Colors

Electric Blue

Main CTAs, Brand Core

HEX:#3B82F6
CSS Var:--brand-primary

Violet Indigo

Secondary brand, highlights

HEX:#6366F1
CSS Var:--brand-secondary

Royal Purple

AI automation highlights

HEX:#8B5CF6
CSS Var:--brand-accent-purple

Vibrant Pink

Engagement, creators

HEX:#EC4899
CSS Var:--brand-accent

Neutrals & Backgrounds

Deep Slate

Dark theme backdrop, text primary

HEX:#0F172A
CSS Var:--dark-bg

Card Slate

Dark dashboard components

HEX:#1E293B
CSS Var:--dark-bg-card

Ice Blue

Light theme backdrop

HEX:#F8FAFC
CSS Var:--light-bg

Pure White

Light layout containers

HEX:#FFFFFF
CSS Var:--light-bg-card

Typography Hierarchy

We utilize a display font for headlines and structural tags, combined with a highly legible sans-serif font for text blocks and dashboard values.

Headings & Titles Plus Jakarta Sans
Heading 1 (Extrabold Display)

Optimize Social

Heading 2 (Bold H2)

One Idea. Automated.

Heading 3 (Semibold H3)

Dashboard Panel Content

Body Copy & Mono Inter & Fira Code
Paragraph (Regular / Height Normal)

Save 5+ hours per week with automated social calendars. Easily generate optimized, tailored captions for LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram with high performance hashtag predictions.

Data / Code (Fira Code Mono)
const brand = { name: "PostPilot", tier: "Pro", limit: 30 };

Standard Design Components

Interactive previews of core platform assets for developers to drop straight into dashboard interfaces.

Button Triggers

class="btn btn-primary"
class="btn btn-secondary"
class="btn btn-dark"
Campaign Active
v1.0

Instagram Weekly Strategy

One text idea was mapped to 5 posts. First post is scheduled for Monday 10:00 AM.

AI Generation Mode
PostPilot Core

Starter Campaign Dashboard

Fully responsive widgets built leveraging standard CSS tokens and custom background blurs.

Twitter Queue: 5 posts
